title: Billy & Two Scoops
description: The now infamous ’80s sitcom about Lenny Scoops, who helps his grandmother run their family ice cream shop, Two Scoops, along with their beloved dog, Billy.
quote: Tell that to my sweet tooth!
altHero: Marcus Kane as Lenny Scoops, a teen boy in a colorful sweater
alt1: Lenny grabbing handfuls of candy while sitting on a couch
alt2: Lenny’s grandmother knitting on a rocking chair and yelling at Lenny about the candy
alt3: grandmother smiles while holding her knitting needles
alt4: Billy, a golden retriever, walks out of the bathroom with some toilet paper stuck to his paw
